title: Human Resource Executive
description:
Reports to: Directors

Core purpose of the role: This position will play a pivotal role in the operations team for all HR related matters. The individual will be responsible for all aspects of HR from recruitment, onboarding/ off boarding processes, claims, training and development, as well as staff engagement and welfare of the employees.

Job scopes:

Recruitment and On-boarding

  • Determine and use the appropriate sourcing channel (including Jobs Bank, LinkedIn, job portals, recruitment agencies and internal applications)
  • Coordinate the recruitment process, including but not limited to understanding job specifications, posting advertisements, pre-screening of candidate’s applications according to specifications, submitting qualified applications to the hiring managers and tracking application progress to position close
  • Conduct interviews
  • Arrange background check of new hires
  • Manage end-to-end on-boarding activities including but not limited to accounts creation, IT related email and access, induction packs
  • Arrange new hire induction

HR Operations

  • Provide prompt update and accurate maintenance of employee database and personnel files
  • Support in providing inputs to update HR reports, budget report, internal HR working templates, external statutory/labour market survey and headcount related reporting
  • Monitor employees' work pass / MOM employment pass compliance
  • Monitor probationary period, etc 
  • Review and update Employee Handbooks and Business Conduct Guidelines
  • Maintain organisation charts and prepare monthly HR reports
  • Support in the update of HR policies, processes and procedures

Performance Management

  • Support the full suite of annual performance review cycle (communications to staff, creation of online forms and provide updates on completion rates and analytics)
  • Work closely with business leaders to ensure the performance management exercises are properly executed and completed on time

Pay Review

  • Support the annual pay review process
  • Creation of excel spreadsheets for management input and analytics to update data on performance excel spreadsheets
  • Participate in C&B surveys and benchmark with various key companies in similar industry

Employee Relations

  • Support to business leaders in all employee relations matters
  • Provide HR policies guidance and interpretation to employees
  • Handle employee grievances, disciplinary issues and counsel staff

Offboarding

  • Coordinate exit process: payroll, employee records, exit interviews

Payroll & Benefits Administration

  • Manage and execute regular benefits administrations
  • Ensure timely and accurate execution of CPF, government-claim submissions (Maternity, Paternity, Childcare and NS claims), income tax (IR8A and IR21) matters
  • Maintain accuracy and update movements in company insurance policy

Employee Engagement

  • Plan and execute internal employee engagement activities such as dialogues, and corporate staff engagement events.

Learning & Development

  • Conduct training needs analysis for business units and employees.
  • Source for external vendors, coordinate course registration and training grant applications
  • Evaluate and monitor training programs and budgets

Ad Hoc Projects

  • Drive and implement process improvements to increase HR efficiency and effectiveness.
  • Participate in ad-hoc assignments and projects as assigned.

Qualifications & Experience:

  • University Degree in Human Resources or related degree
  • Strong knowledge of HR generalist functions and at least 3 years of relevant experience

Knowledge / Skills

  • Confidentiality and discretion.
  • Excellent attention to detail and organisational skills.
  • Effective communication and interpersonal skills.
  • Comfortable in a fast-paced and dynamic environment.
  • Proactive and highly organized with excellent time management skills & adherence to deadlines.
  • A problem solver with a “can do” attitude who is not afraid to think outside the box.   
  • A collaborative team player, who is sociable
  • Ability to work independently and autonomously. 
  • Advanced knowledge of MS Office: Excel, Word, PowerPoint, Outlook

postedCompany.name: ASPIRE HUB EDUCATION CENTRE @ BEDOK MALL PTE. LTD.
